name: Vicar Street (Theatre)
content: Home venue of Foil Arms and Hog, a sketch comedy group that I have been following since I was in middle school. The theater itself is kinda funky in a good way—murals of the Beatles, spinny barstool chairs in the pit, etc. I would recommend seeing Foil Arms and Hog there. Logically, Vicar Street theatre is located on Thomas street.
